summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were present, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed by this job.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with green evidence should remain open for maintainer review; it is unrelated to the other inventory PRs.
Member-owned broad feature PR has conflicts, failing checks, and review blockers, but it is legitimate independent work and should stay open for the author/maintainers.
Draft focused PR lacks required real behavior proof, but it is a plausible independent fix path and should remain open.
Independent CLI feature PR has unresolved proof/review gates and should remain open rather than be closed or grouped into a shared canonical path.
Focused contributor PR is a plausible fix path for an open linked issue but needs platform proof before maintainer action.
